title: Refine compiler macro substitution implementation details
body:
## Outcome

Refine macro substitution implementation.

## Context

- Workstream **analysis-pipeline** — compiler pipeline and api.json spine.
- Contributes to deliverable **Composition HIR & macro expansion** (`v02-composition-macros-hir`).
- Macro work follows platform-spec **language-meta/macros** semantics (registry, expand pass, resolver re-resolve).

## Provenance

- **Repository:** `compiler`
- **Commit:** [`2518c48`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/compiler/commit/2518c48) — fix(compiler): refine macro substitution implementation
